title: Cold Water Can Freeze Instantly!

scenes.text: Water can freeze instantly under special conditions!
This phenomenon is known as 'supercooling', where water stays liquid below freezing.
When disturbed, supercooled water can freeze almost instantly into ice.
This can occur in controlled conditions, like in labs or during certain weather conditions.
scenes.label: FREEZING SCIENCE

scenes.text: Follow for a mind-blowing fact every day.

description: Under special conditions, water can freeze instantly! Follow for more fascinating science facts!
